summary: Complete end-to-end testing of AsyncTicket application completed successfully. All major features tested including dashboard, ticket creation, viewing, search, filtering, PDF generation, and public ticket sharing. Backend APIs fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend UI working properly with dark theme and responsive design.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads with correct statistics (Total Tickets: 6, Today: 6, Revenue calculations)
Search functionality by customer name works correctly
Date filters (Todos, Hoy, Semana, Mes) functional
Create new ticket form with customer info, multiple items, calculations
Automatic subtotal and total calculation with discount support
Ticket creation and 'Save and View' navigation successful
Ticket view page displays all data correctly with dark theme
Download PDF button present and functional
Copy link and View Public buttons functional
Dropdown menu actions (Ver, Descargar PDF, Duplicar, Compartir WhatsApp) working
Public ticket view at /t/:publicId displays correctly
QR code generation in public tickets
Backend API endpoints (12/12 tests passed): root, stats, CRUD operations, search, filtering, PDF generation, public view, duplication
Error handling for non-existent tickets (404 responses)
